news_items.headline: Rafael Devers won’t get much better than this
news_items.summary: Oh well. You win some, you lose some. Or, in the Giants’ case, you mostly lose. It has been a year since the Giants traded for Rafael Devers, and like most of their big swings since allowing Buster Posey to take the reins of the front office, the team has come up empty and looked […]

news_items.headline: Rockies hit jackpot with 23 runs in steamy Vegas as Athletics finish wild stretch in future home
